metadata.description: Football data analytics toolkit for Claude Code

plugins.name: nutmeg
plugins.description: Football data analytics toolkit. Covers Opta, StatsBomb, Wyscout, SportMonks, and free sources. Acquire, wrangle, compute, analyse, and learn across any programming language. Includes a searchable MCP docs server with 400+ indexed documentation chunks across 6 providers. 10 skills, 2 agents.
